text:
Hospitalization or Emergency Department - Medicaid-Only Claims NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Opioid Use Disorder-Related to Hospitalization or Emergency Department Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
OUD_HOSP_MEDICARE Opioid-Related Hospitalization or Emergency Department - Medicare-Only Claims NUM 1 This
